title: ostericum koreanum
intro: Ostericum koreanum, also known as the Korean angelica or Dong quai, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been traditionally used in Eastern medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ostericum koreanum include relieving menstrual cramps, improving circulation, and reducing fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Ostericum koreanum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and balance in the body.
